The '''Château Malreaux''' was the ancestral home of the [[House Malreaux|Malreaux family]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]]. It was a dreary building with a cream-and-crimson color scheme, described as resembling dried [[Blood/Legends|blood]] and curdled [[Milk/Legends|milk]], overlooking the [[Bay of Tears]]. It was also one of the most secure locations on the planet, having a very advanced security system and many secret passages. The security system was installed by the last [[Malreaux|Viscount Malreaux]] during his descent into madness and [[paranoia]].

The security system consisted of arrangements of automated traps and automated defense lasers, the Château was also equipped with a sophisticated shield generators which was presumably deactivated by [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] when he took residence there.

Dooku used it during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] in a trap he set for [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]]. He called the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] to negotiate his defection to the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] there, but [[Mission to Vjun (Clone Wars)|the mission]] was proven to be a ruse.
